---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Pi-NVR
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case, not just the feature.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Performance impact**
Pi-NVR targets a Raspberry Pi 3 first. If your idea involves additional
video decoding, always-on processing, or a new background service, please
say so — it affects how (or whether) it fits the project's CPU/RAM budget.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.
